task.objective: Cleanly rebootstrap exact-baseline, source-grounded Phase 1 Deterministic Kernel Vertical Slice gate evidence after PHASE1-GATE-001 was blocked for authority-procedure defects, without changing product semantics, current phase authority, production code, contracts, tests, or repository runtime behavior.

requirements: Treat this as a clean-rebootstrap gate-evidence preparation from exact main baseline 0616091da1a572a2ea3e457ed84dab8e32259f59. PHASE1-GATE-001 and PR #11 are blocked historical context only and must not be treated as task authority or accepted evidence.

Do not cherry-pick, merge, copy, or reuse gate evidence, Builder review, validation-evidence text, commits, or generated conclusions from phase1/phase-1-gate-1 or PR #11. Re-read current-main authority, source, and tests and regenerate the evidence independently on this clean branch. Identical factual observations may recur only when freshly re-derived from the exact current baseline.

Fetch origin and confirm current origin/main exactly equals 0616091da1a572a2ea3e457ed84dab8e32259f59. If main has advanced, inspect every additional main commit and stop if the review subject or authority boundary materially changed.
Before any edit, run pnpm governance:check against the committed PHASE1-GATE-002 contract and require exit status 0. If the contract is invalid, stop BLOCKED and do not edit any writable target.
Read every authority.read document before producing gate evidence.

Before editing docs/engineering/validation-evidence.md, perform and record explicit Authority-Change Preflight. Identify that the target declares an Authority section, identify PHASE1-GATE-002 as the current schema-valid contract, confirm scope.write authorizes the target, confirm it is not read-only or forbidden, confirm authority.mayChangeAuthority is exactly true, and confirm the task objective and acceptance requirements explicitly authorize adding bounded Builder gate validation evidence. This grant is narrow and does not authorize current phase authority, product authority, constitutional, protocol, Trust, Verdict, Evidence authority, or semantic changes.

Treat this as autonomous gate-evidence preparation, not implementation and not phase transition. Continue through exact-baseline inspection, source and test review, evidence mapping, mechanical verification, evidence correction within writable non-product evidence paths, retries, commit, and push until BUILDER_READY_FOR_INDEPENDENT_GATE, REVISION_REQUIRED, or BLOCKED is reached.

Build a source-grounded Phase 1 objective coverage matrix for the exact authorized flow Claim -> Evidence Contract -> Evidence Requirement -> Observation -> Evidence satisfaction -> Rule -> Verdict reduction -> Evidence Bundle. For every edge, identify concrete implementation paths, relevant exported or internal functions, representative tests, and residual uncertainty. Do not rely on Builder claims or test names alone.

Inspect the production package surface and prove whether current production code is limited to packages/contracts and packages/kernel. Inventory public exports from both packages and identify any export or package that exceeds the Phase 1 package boundary.

Independently inspect current kernel source and representative tests for deterministic Evidence satisfaction, Rule evaluation, Verdict precedence and reason retention, deterministic Evidence Bundle identity and lineage, caller-input non-mutation, finalized deep immutability, Claim non-evidentiary behavior, Observation scope enforcement, inference-shaped authority-field rejection, reserved reason-code rejection, malformed boundary rejection, and repeated or permuted input stability.

Audit production source and package manifests for forbidden Phase 1 integration or nondeterministic authority paths including repository or filesystem inspection, target-code execution, verification-command execution, child process use, package-manager or build-tool execution, network clients, GitHub integration, model-provider integration, Inference Zone implementation, current-time dependence, randomness, UUID generation, environment-dependent authoritative input, probabilistic confidence, or LLM judgment. Distinguish production behavior from test-only and repository-governance Node utilities.

Review every Known Gap in docs/engineering/kernel-assurance-campaign.md and classify each as PHASE1_BLOCKER, FUTURE_PHASE_GAP, or RECORD_DRIFT. Give source-grounded rationale. A future product capability that Phase 1 explicitly forbids is not a Phase 1 blocker merely because it is absent.

Audit README.md, docs/constitution/product-constitution.md, and docs/plans/active/phase-1-deterministic-kernel-vertical-slice.md for stale current-state declarations. Record exact stale or potentially stale assertions as transition candidates, but do not edit any current-phase authority, README, or plan in this task.

Record an exact gate findings table. Every finding must include ID, severity, affected path or surface, observation, risk to the Phase 1 objective or Gate integrity, evidence, and disposition. Do not silently remediate production source, contracts, tests, current phase authority, or semantics from this gate task.

If source review identifies a real Phase 1 objective defect, boundary violation, forbidden integration, semantic drift, or unverifiable required invariant, set Builder status to REVISION_REQUIRED and preserve the finding for independent review. Do not weaken tests or reinterpret the Phase 1 objective to obtain readiness.
If Authority-Change Preflight cannot be satisfied before an authority-bearing edit, stop BLOCKED before editing. Successful verification must not be treated as retroactive authority.

Create docs/engineering/phase-1-gate-evidence.md as a fresh engineering evidence record. It must state the exact review baseline, clean-rebootstrap provenance, coverage matrix, package and export inventory, deterministic invariant evidence, forbidden-surface audit, Known Gap classification, record-drift inventory, findings, mechanical command results, deterministic verify no-mutation comparison, and known limitations.

Append a fresh PHASE1-GATE-002 section to docs/engineering/validation-evidence.md containing the recorded preflight, actual commands, and bounded results. Historical evidence already on main must remain intact and must not be rewritten as newly executed Gate evidence.

Create docs/reviews/phase-1-gate-builder-review.md as a fresh Builder self-review. The Builder may conclude only BUILDER_READY_FOR_INDEPENDENT_GATE, REVISION_REQUIRED, or BLOCKED. It must not claim PASS, PASS_FOR_INTEGRATION, Phase 1 closure, Phase 2 authorization, product readiness, trusted release, or a Proofrail product Verdict.

After evidence and Builder review are otherwise complete, perform a deterministic pnpm verify no-mutation pre/post comparison using tracked diff hash and sorted status state. Record the exact method, pre/post values, exit status, and sequencing limitation. Qualitative observation alone is insufficient.

Inspect the final diff from origin/main to HEAD and prove the clean Gate preparation delta is limited to PHASE1-GATE-002 writable evidence and review paths plus the externally Governor-committed read-only PHASE1-GATE-002 task contract. Builder must not modify the task contract.
Commit and push the completed clean Gate evidence work to phase1/phase-1-gate-2. Do not merge.

requiredInvariants: PHASE1-GATE-002 is schema-valid before any Builder edit.
The Builder does not modify PHASE1-GATE-002 or any governance task contract.
Authority-Change Preflight is recorded and satisfied before editing the authority-bearing validation evidence record.
The exact Phase 1 review baseline is identified and current main movement is accounted for.
The authorized Claim-to-Evidence-Bundle flow is mapped to concrete current implementation and test evidence.
Production package scope remains limited to packages/contracts and packages/kernel.
No Phase 1 forbidden integration or nondeterministic authoritative path is present in current production code.
Evidence satisfaction, Rule evaluation, Verdict reduction, reason retention, lineage, identity, caller isolation, and final immutability remain deterministic and source-grounded.
Claim content cannot become Evidence authority and inference-shaped fields cannot enter the authoritative path.
Known gaps are classified without converting explicitly future-phase capabilities into false Phase 1 blockers.
Stale repository current-state declarations are inventoried but not edited before an independent Gate decision.

Gate preparation does not change production code, tests, contracts, current phase authority, product semantics, Verdict semantics, Evidence authority classes, Trust semantics, or canonical terminology.
Builder status is not independent Gate acceptance.
pnpm verify is non-mutating under the recorded deterministic pre/post comparison.
The final origin/main-to-HEAD delta is limited to the externally Governor-committed Gate task contract and PHASE1-GATE-002 writable evidence or review paths.

stopConditions: PHASE1-GATE-002 fails schema or governance validation before Builder edits
Authority-Change Preflight cannot authorize the validation-evidence edit
A required Phase 1 objective cannot be verified from current source and tests
A real Phase 1 objective defect is found
A forbidden Phase 1 integration or nondeterministic authoritative path is found
Verdict semantics would need to change
Evidence authority classes would need to change
Trust semantics would need to change
canonical terminology would need to change
current phase authority would need to change
production source, contracts, or tests would need remediation
the Gate task would need to authorize Phase 2
repeated autonomous evidence-preparation convergence reaches a deadlock
